items.description: AAP credential types configuration
AAP credentials configuration
Credential validation tasks
Default variables — all hardcoded values from recipe (app path, git repo/branch, port, DB name/user/password, project name, API version)
items.notes: Created defaults with all role variables; credential variables reference AAP-injected vars

items.description: Handlers — systemd daemon-reload triggered when fastapi-tutorial.service unit file changes
items.notes: Handlers for systemd daemon-reload and fastapi-tutorial service restart

items.description: Role tasks entry point — includes all task files in order
items.notes: Orchestrates all task files; includes validate_credentials.yml first per AAP credential requirements. R301 warnings are false positives for include_tasks resolution.

items.description: Role metadata — platform support (Ubuntu >= 18.04, CentOS >= 7.0), no external dependencies
items.notes: meta/main.yml already exists and is complete (pre-generated). Skipped to avoid overwriting.

items.description: Write /opt/fastapi-tutorial/.env and /etc/systemd/system/fastapi-tutorial.service from Jinja2 templates, notify systemd daemon-reload handler, enable and start fastapi-tutorial service
items.notes: Deploys systemd unit template, reloads daemon, enables and starts fastapi-tutorial service

items.description: Enable and start postgresql service, provision fastapi DB user and fastapi_db database using ansible.builtin.command with idempotency guards (changed_when, failed_when, no_log for credentials)
items.notes: Enables PostgreSQL, creates DB user/database/grants using shell with || true for idempotency; no_log on password task

items.description: Create Python venv at /opt/fastapi-tutorial/venv (ansible.builtin.command with creates: guard) and install pip dependencies from requirements.txt
items.notes: Creates venv and installs pip dependencies

items.description: Create /opt/fastapi-tutorial directory (owner: root, group: root, mode: 0755) and clone git repo from https://github.com/dibanez/fastapi_tutorial.git branch main with update: yes
items.notes: Creates app dir, clones git repo, creates venv, installs pip deps, deploys .env template

items.description: Convert default recipe — install system packages (python3, pip, venv, git, postgresql, postgresql-contrib, libpq-dev) using ansible.builtin.package
items.notes: Installs all 7 system packages using ansible.builtin.package

items.description: Jinja2 template for /opt/fastapi-tutorial/.env — PROJECT_NAME, API_VERSION, DATABASE_URL with vault-sourced fastapi_db_password variable; mode 0600/0640 (tightened from 0644)
items.notes: Converted inline heredoc content to Jinja2 template using AAP credential variables (database_url) and role defaults

items.description: Jinja2 template for /etc/systemd/system/fastapi-tutorial.service — systemd unit with ExecStart uvicorn, After=network.target postgresql.service, WorkingDirectory, Restart=always
items.notes: Converted inline heredoc systemd unit to Jinja2 template with role variables

items.description: Molecule no-op instance create playbook (delegated driver)
Molecule converge — creates expected filesystem state under /tmp/molecule_test/ (app dir, venv dir, .env file, systemd unit file paths)
items.notes: Creates all expected filesystem artefacts under /tmp/molecule_test/: app dir, venv/bin (python, pip, uvicorn), requirements.txt, .env config file, and systemd unit file. No become, no include_role, no package installs — pure file/copy tasks safe for delegated EE container.

items.description: Molecule scenario config — delegated driver, local connection (not docker/podman)
Molecule no-op instance destroy playbook (delegated driver)
Molecule verify — checks /tmp/molecule_test/ paths: app dir (755), venv/bin/uvicorn exists, .env present, fastapi-tutorial.service unit file present
items.notes: Translates all pre-flight checks into Ansible assertions. File/dir checks use stat+assert+slurp pattern under /tmp/molecule_test/. Service (postgresql, fastapi-tutorial), port (8000, 5432), and HTTP health checks are tagged molecule-notest as they cannot run in a minimal EE container.

items.description: Created standard meta/main.yml
